title: Mechanics and Energy
description: Vectors and the SUVAT equations, projectile motion, Newton's three laws with momentum conservation, and work, energy and power for mechanical systems.
objectives: Distinguish scalar and vector quantities and resolve a vector into perpendicular components
Apply the SUVAT equations to motion with constant acceleration in one dimension
Model projectile motion by treating horizontal and vertical components independently
State Newton's three laws of motion and apply F = ma to force problems
Apply conservation of momentum to elastic and inelastic collisions
Calculate work done, kinetic energy, gravitational potential energy and power, and apply conservation of mechanical energy

lessons.title: Scalars, vectors and the SUVAT equations
